div1.entryFree: Trencher, a plate: nor scrape t., nor wash dish, Tp. II, 2, 187. he steps me to her t. and steals her capon's leg, Gent. IV, 4, 10. holding a t. LLL V, 2, 477. take it to you, --s, cups and all, Shr. IV, 1, 168. fed from my t. H6B IV, 1, 57. serve with thy t. Cor. IV, 5, 54. he shift a t.? he scrape a t.? Rom. I, 5, 2. one which holds a t. Tim. I, 1, 120 (== is a servant). I found you as a morsel cold upon dead Caesar's t. Ant. III, 13, 117.
